notifyClients.description: Push SSE event to all connected browser clients for live-reload

branding-artifacts-module.description: Artifact registry module: manifest CRUD, file operations, Zod-validated artifacts.json

artifact-crud-api.description: HTTP endpoints for programmatic artifact management (create, list, delete)

sse-endpoint.description: Server-Sent Events endpoint for auto-reload and artifact notifications

hub-page.description: Redesigned hub page renderer producing artifact card gallery HTML

sse-connection-cleanup.description: All SSE connections tracked in a Set and cleared on server stop; max 10 concurrent connections

fs-watch-debounce.description: File system watcher debounces events by 200-500ms; ignores filename argument and re-scans directory

xss-prevention.description: All dynamic content in hub page HTML is escaped before insertion

zero-new-dependencies.description: No new npm production dependencies; uses only node:http, node:fs built-ins

definition.scope: Complete overhaul of the branding webserver: SSE auto-reload, artifact registry system with branding-artifacts.cjs, hub page redesign to artifact card gallery, extended branding skill flow for logo/wireframe/guidelines generation.

tasks.description: Implement SSE endpoint and fs.watch auto-reload infrastructure
tasks.acceptance: Browser receives SSE events within 500ms of file changes

tasks.description: Create branding-artifacts.cjs with artifact manifest schema and CRUD
tasks.acceptance: Artifacts can be created, listed, and deleted with Zod-validated manifest

tasks.description: Redesign hub page as artifact card gallery
tasks.acceptance: Hub page renders typed cards with timestamps from manifest

tasks.description: Add artifact CRUD HTTP API endpoints
Extend branding skill flow for sequential artifact generation
tasks.acceptance: Skill flow generates theme -> logo -> wireframe -> guidelines in sequence

acceptance: All tasks complete with passing tests
